01 / Careers

Graduate intake
3 cohorts /yr
Partner-mentored

Careers / FY26 intake

Work with partners.
From day one.

A boutique firm cannot afford to hide graduates behind senior consultants — and we don't want to. From your first engagement, you sit at the partner's table, contribute to the work, and own real pieces of client deliverables.1

02 / Open positions

Open positions

4 positions open.

Meridian recruits in three cohorts each year. All positions are based in our Perth office. Application deadlines are listed on each role.

03 / Process

Hiring process

Three rounds. No case interviews.

We do not run case interviews because we believe they test for case-interview skill, not consulting skill. Our process is built around real conversations about real work.

Round 01 Application

CV+letter

A CV and a one-page letter on a problem you have helped solve. Read by a partner, replied to within five business days.

Round 02 Conversation

60min

An hour with two consultants and a partner. Real questions about your experience, your interests, and your reasoning.

Round 03 Offer

10days

References, then a written offer including salary, study support, and start date. Decisions within ten business days of round two.

  1. Graduate consultants are paired with a partner mentor on day one and receive structured rotations across the strategy, operations, and government practices in the first 12 months. Performance reviews are quarterly.

Meridian Advisory

A boutique management consulting firm based in Perth, working with mid-market and government clients across Western Australia. Founded 2014.
